positiveClaims: A DOCX with tracked-change markers and no review comments can produce a diagnostic-only Review evidence surface.
The diagnostic-only evidence surface reaches the existing in-memory Review surface through the delivered DOCX review preview-session path.
Diagnostic items render as read-only Review items in the Comments/Review panel.
Clean DOCX with no review comments and no diagnostics remains no-candidate and passive.
DOCX comments still use the existing comments-only preview path.
DOCX tracked changes remain diagnosticItems only and do not become textChanges.
The local-file entry still uses main-owned picker/stat/read/restat and requestId-only renderer/menu payload authority.
nonClaims: No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No DOCX tracked-change apply is claimed.
No exact apply from DOCX is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by DOCX diagnostic evidence preview.
No project truth write is performed by DOCX diagnostic evidence preview.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by DOCX diagnostic evidence preview.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No Word layout parity or full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud, sync, accounts, cross-platform readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Preflight remains diagnostic-only and does not itself create a Review session.
Preview-session activation owns visible Review surface activation.
Diagnostic-only Review visibility is not project truth.
Tracked changes are evidence, not mutation instructions.
Diagnostic-only candidate has canOpenReviewSession false and canCreateReviewPacket false even when it carries a bounded internal visibility packet.
Apply lane remains separate and keeps receipt and recovery ownership.

machineChecks.command: node --test targeted DOCX diagnostic evidence surface contracts and Review UI unit tests

agentAudits.verdict: diagnostic-only surface for tracked-only DOCX was the factual gap; no textChanges, applyOps, receipt, recovery, or writes should be introduced
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by diagnostic-only visibility packet, main authority guard, renderer read-only item, and targeted contracts

agentAudits.verdict: conditional pass only if the contour stays diagnostic evidence visibility and blocks import, apply, storage, receipt, recovery, and release claims
agentAudits.localResolution: accepted; implementation keeps diagnostic evidence out of project truth and apply authority

agentAudits.verdict: implementation scope passed; report accuracy blocked only on missing changedBasenames
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by adding CONTEXT.md, HANDOFF.md, WORKLOG.md, and GOVERNANCE_CHANGE_APPROVALS.json to changedBasenames before delivery
